Function.Inference: Starts the track, introduces the rhythm, and ends with a repeat sign.
The main looped body containing the primary themes, ending with a repeat sign.

Section.Inference: Introductory ostinato pattern setting up the groove.
Introduces the main melodic idea over a rhythmic ostinato.
Contrasting sustained melody, ending with a tension build-up.
